summary: Completed comprehensive testing of token-based export functionality for Excel/PDF downloads. All core features working correctly including stone verification, token generation, and file downloads.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 500 instead of 400 for empty stone IDs array
minor_bugs.impact: Minor - error handling works but status code inconsistent

passed_tests: POST /api/prepare-export with format=excel returns valid token
POST /api/prepare-export with format=pdf returns valid token
GET /api/download/{token} serves Excel file with Content-Disposition attachment header
GET /api/download/{token} serves PDF file with Content-Disposition attachment header
Frontend: Export to Excel button triggers token-based download flow
Frontend: Export to PDF button triggers token-based download flow
Full flow: LZ1809693,LZ2107107 -> verify -> results display -> export excel/pdf works
Stone verification with real stone IDs (LZ1809693, LZ2107107)
Results table displays correctly with sustainable certification badges
Certificate links are functional and properly formatted
File upload tab and format guide display correctly
Export buttons enable/disable based on data availability
Success notifications appear after export actions

success_percentage.backend: 93% (14/15 tests passed - 1 minor status code issue)
